  - [ ] New feature

  ## Testing

  ## Checklist

  - [ ] My code follows the existing style (TypeScript strict, no `any`, no dead imports)
  - [ ] I have added or updated tests where applicable
  - [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, ARCHITECTURE, STATUS, etc.) if behavior changed
  - [ ] I have not introduced new dependencies without discussion
  - [ ] I have not committed secrets, keys, or tokens
